cancel.title: Hey, we’re sorry to see you go! <1>Are you sure you want to cancel?</1>
cancel.pause_desc: Temporarily suspend your subscription without fees, maintaining your settings and preferences for when you're ready to resume.
cancel.lose: Here’s what you’ll lose if you cancel
cancel.help_desc_1: Hi friend, I just wanted to take a minute to thank you for the time you've spent with us.
cancel.help_desc_2: We fully support your decision to cancel and appreciate you being a customer for so long. However, is there anything I can do to help resolve any concerns?
cancel.important: Important: By canceling your subscription, you will lose your account, your data, and all features associated with your plan.
cancel.nevermind: Never mind! Take me back to my account
cancel.share_reason: Please share your reason for leaving
cancel.not_sure: Not sure how to use Jubilee for dropshipping
cancel.return: How likely are you to return?
cancel.exp: Anything else you'd like to share about your experience?
cancel.understand: I understand that by proceeding, I will immediately lose access to my account, including all data and records since joining.
cancel.text_placeholder: What makes you cancel this subscription?
cancel.want_help: Want 1-on-1 help from a real person?
cancel.want_help_desc: One of our Customer Happiness Specialists will be happy to guide you through any difficulties you have encountered.
cancel.feedback: We are always looking for ways to improve our product or service for our customers. Can you take a minute to share some feedback?
cancel.trial_desc: Need some more time to figure out Jubilee? That’s ok, we will extend your trial for 7 more days!
cancel.sure_desc: You are about to cancel your account. This action cannot be undone. Please type <1> 'CONFIRM' </1> in the box below to proceed with the cancellation.
